articles.title_en: Kurenkov noted the high competence of firefighters when extinguishing a fire at the Tuapse refinery
articles.lead_en: The head of the Russian Ministry of Emergency Situations presented state and departmental awards to personnel

articles.title_en: The DPR is planning non-standard approaches to demining agricultural land

articles.title_en: Russian emergency workers in Tuapse say they’ve extinguished the third fire at an oil refinery struck by Ukrainian drone debris
articles.lead_en: Firefighters have fully extinguished the blaze at the Tuapse oil refinery, the Emergency Situations Ministry’s press service said.
articles.title_raw: Russian emergency workers in Tuapse say they’ve extinguished the third fire at an oil refinery struck by Ukrainian drone debris
articles.lead_raw: Firefighters have fully extinguished the blaze at the Tuapse oil refinery, the Emergency Situations Ministry’s press service said.

articles.title_en: Russian disinformation network Storm-1516 is flooding the West with fake stories, and JD Vance repeated one of them
articles.lead_en: A Russian disinformation network known as Storm-1516 has been operating in the West since 2023, actively spreading fabricated stories and interfering in the political processes of foreign states. The group is believed to include former employees of Yevgeny Prigozhin’s troll factory and has been linked to the GRU.

articles.title_en: Hundreds of Dogs Perish in Nizhny Novgorod Fire
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Emergency Situations Ministry said the fire broke out in an outbuilding where the animals were presumably kept.
